description: A ground-level photograph depicts a *Eucalyptus sp.* plantation in Southern Spain, specifically near Lepe (Huelva). A dirt road or forest track extends through the middle foreground and recedes into the background, flanked by young to medium-sized eucalyptus trees. The trees form a dense canopy in the background and along the sides of the road. The ground adjacent to the road shows some bare earth and sparse undergrowth. The sky is bright and clear. The image caption states: "Eucalyptus sp. plantation in Southern Spain. Lepe (Huelva, Spain) SPOT-5 (2.5 m) (NIR Band Combination). Date: 2011-08-06. Source: CNES 2011© Distribution Airbus DS/Spot Image."
